templates.name: Are the bralettes padded or double-layered?
templates.content: Boss Bralette is double-layered in the front for added support and coverage.

templates.name: Can I add multiple one-time products to my subscription?
templates.content: Yes, this is one of the many perks for subscribers. A one-time add is a product that is added to your next subscription but is not recurring - it will only ship once! You can add as many one-time products as you wish. There's no limit to how many colors and styles you can enjoy. Just a reminder that all our one-time add ons are 25% off!

templates.name: Free shipping
templates.content: We offer free shipping on all domestic orders!

templates.name: How do I add a one time product to my subscription?
templates.content:
There are two ways to add a one-time add on - from your dashboard or from the product pages and for both ways you need to be logged into your account. If you want to add them through your dashboard once logged in, just click on new releases, best sellers, or complete the set and add as few or as many "one-time add" products as you want.

If you want to add them through the product pages, simply scroll through the website, choose the products you like and click on "Add one time to your subscription".

templates.name: Customer support
templates.content: The best way to handle this is to email us directly at hello@woxer.com. Our team is happy to help!

templates.name: Military / First responder / Healthcare / Teacher discount
templates.content: Thank you for your service! We don't have any specific discounts like that, but our deals will always be shared with our SMS subscribers or on our website, so keep an eye out!

templates.name: Where are your items made / manufactured?
templates.content: All our products are made in Peru and Sri Lanka.

templates.name: Do you offer free returns?
templates.content: We offer free return postage for all U.S. orders.

templates.name: When does my gift card expire?
templates.content: Our Gift Cards never expire.

templates.name: How do I update or change my credit card under my subscription?
templates.content: Please log into your account. Under your subscription box, you'll see a payment method - click "update". Our system will automatically send you an email with a link to "confirm payment information". Once you click on the button, you'll see your current credit card! Click on the small "change" text to update it with a new card. Let me know how that goes!

templates.name: Brand ambassador / sponsorship / affiliate program
templates.content: Thank you for your interest! The best way to discuss this is to email us directly at hessah@woxer.com. Our team is happy to chat.

templates.name: How long does it take for my refund to process?
templates.content: Once your refund has been processed, it will take 4-7 business days to reflect in your account. You will receive an email notification.

templates.name: What are your products made of?
templates.content: Our items are made of Lenzing Modal, a sustainable fabric made from beechwood trees. We chose Modal over cotton because modal requires less water and energy. Modal is more breathable than cotton, polyester, nylon, and lycra making it healthier for women.

templates.name: Does Boss bralette use the same fabric as Woxer Underwear?
templates.content: Boss Bralette is the same fabric as Woxer underwear. Our Modal fabric comes from sustainably sourced beechwood trees. Modal is super soft, breathable, and long-lasting.

templates.name: Do you provide gift wrapping or discreet packaging?
templates.content: We do! After you place an order, please contact us at hello@woxer.com so we can arrange it for you.

templates.name: Store location / retailer
templates.content: We don't currently have a store but definitely keep an eye out!

templates.name: How can I model for you?
templates.content: I'm afraid that applications are currently closed. Only and if you are based in Miami, Florida, please email steph@woxer.com with the following information: subject - Woxer Model 2023, full name and pronouns, Instagram handle, why do you want to model for us, where you're located and kindly attach three pictures of yourself.

templates.name: Social media
templates.content: Give us a follow on IG: https://www.instagram.com/woxer/ and FB here: https://www.facebook.com/wearewoxer/

templates.name: Will you be releasing new colors or prints?
templates.content: We release new colors every month and most are one-time releases. Sign up to receive emails or follow us on Instagram @woxer to stay up to date on new releases!

templates.name: Shipping time
templates.content: We usually ship via USPS or FedEx and once shipped it will take 5-10 business days domestically and 9-21 business days internationally.

templates.name: How should I care/wash my items?
templates.content: If you are using a washing machine, make sure you wash with cold water and if you are using a drying machine, make sure you dry on low tumble. We highly recommend you air dry your pairs so they last longer.

templates.name: What are the perks of being a subscriber?
templates.content: We offer our subscribers a lot of perks! You can check them all out here: https://woxer-faqs.gorgias.help/en-US/what-are-the-perks-of-being-a-subscriber-97395

templates.name: Cancel / edit order
templates.content: I can check if that's possible. What's the order number, email address and the change you'd like to make?

templates.name: Do you ship to PO Boxes?
templates.content: Yes, we do ship to P.O. Boxes!

templates.name: Phone support
templates.content: We don't offer phone support right now but I'd be happy to help you over text, let me know what I can do for you!

templates.name: Are these bralettes good for working out?
templates.content: Boss and Icon Bralettes are form-fitting to give you the gentle support and comfort needed for low to medium impact workouts.

templates.name: Wholesale inquiries
templates.content: Thank you for your interest! The best way to discuss wholesale is to email us directly at hello@woxer.com. Our team is happy to chat.

templates.name: How do I change the shipping info on my subscription?
templates.content:
In order to change your address, follow these three easy steps"

1.) Log in to your account
2.) Scroll down and click on "Update" under shipping info
3.) Fill out your new address and click "save"

Let me know how that goes!

templates.name: Are the Boss bralettes breathable?
templates.content: Boss Bralettes are made from naturally derived materials that are safe for extended fabric-to-skin contact and are ultra-breathable.

templates.name: Sizing
templates.content: Happy to help! I'd recommend taking a look at the size chart on each product page.  If you are in between sizes, size down for a snug feeling and support, and size up if you are looking for comfort. Let me know if you're still unsure!

templates.name: Return policy
templates.content: You can check out our detailed return policy here: https://woxer.com/pages/woxer-faq#returns-exchanges:~:text=my%20order%20arrives%3F-,Returns%20%26%20exchanges,-What%20is%20your

templates.content: You can take a look at our women's size chart here: https://woxer.com/pages/size-guide

templates.content: You can take a look at our sale collection here: https://woxer.com/collections/warehouse-sale
